name: refactor_002_result_formatter
description: Introduce a shared result formatter used by HTTP, CLI, and notification presentation layers.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this task remains a refactor because HTTP, CLI, and notification outputs must stay behavior-compatible while result shaping moves into one shared formatter. It is harder now because there is a second presentation call site and a verification script that checks the full contract, not just one path.
mutability_notes: Weakness addressed: the original task was solvable by editing one output path. The hardened version now catches shallow fixes that update HTTP or CLI formatting without routing notifications and no-warning cases through the same shared formatter.
